name: Health Extension Grain-Free Duck Entree Canned Dog Food
description: 100% Grain-Free Health Extension Duck Entree is an excellent source of high quality protein, made with all-natural duck. The sweet potatoes add an excellent source of vitamins, minerals and beta-carotene. Dogs will enjoy and benefit from this deboned duck entree free from growth hormones, steroids, meat by-products and allergy related fillers.
